user_story: As a Manager, I want to view a list of employee travel requests with title, employee, department, trip details and requested advance, so that I can review my team's travel requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Travel Requests screen; When the list loads; Then each request shows title, employee name, department name, trip details, requested advance and status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter travel requests by active or inactive employees, so that I can focus on the relevant employee set
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Travel Requests screen; When I select Active employees or Inactive employees; Then the list is filtered to that employee status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter travel requests by a From and To period, so that I can review requests within a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Travel Requests screen; When I pick a From and To date using the calendar and search; Then only travel requests within that period are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter travel requests by department, so that I can review requests for a specific department
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Travel Requests screen; When I select a department and search; Then only requests for that department are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter travel requests by status such as Pending Approval, Approved, Initiated, Completed, Travel Coordinator Confirmed and settlement states, so that I can track requests through their lifecycle
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Travel Requests screen; When I select a status and search; Then only travel requests with that status are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to assign a travel request, so that the request is routed to the appropriate handler for processing
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Travel Requests screen; When I click Assign travel request for a request; Then the request is assigned for further processing

user_story: As a Manager, I want to search and reset the travel request filters, so that I can apply criteria and quickly clear them
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then the list reflects my criteria; And when I click Reset; Then all filters return to their defaults
